name: Valor Resources Limited
summary: Valor Resources Limited engages in the exploration and examination of mineral resource properties. It primarily holds a 100% interest in the Berenguela project located in the Puno Department of southeastern Peru; and Picha project, which consists of 3,000 hectare exploration concession located in the Moquegua Department of southern Peru. The company was formerly known as The Carajas Copper Company Limited and changed its name to Valor Resources Limited in February 2017. Valor Resources Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Perth, Australia.
